channel.title: Projects on Ruchita Vehale
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Ruchita Vehale

item.title: Dynamic Visual SLAM with YOLOv8 + DeepSORT + MiDaS
item.description: Real-time SLAM that filters dynamic objects to prevent map corruption, enabling reliable localisation in real-world environments with people and vehicles.

item.title: Autonomous Drone Landing via Multi-Sensor Fusion
item.description: Precision landing system fusing GPS, Raspberry Pi camera, LiDAR and stereo depth, deployed at HVN Labs. Handles environments where GPS alone is insufficient.

item.title: Hybrid Apple Detection: YOLOv8 vs Traditional CV
item.description: Deep learning benchmark study: YOLOv8 trained for 1,500 epochs against traditional CV methods. Published in SSRN Electronic Journal.

item.title: AI Dungeon Maze: Supervised + Unsupervised + RL
item.description: All three ML paradigms integrated on a single D&D maze dataset, deployed as a playable Pygame environment.

item.title: Leader-Follower Robot with QTR-RC Sensor Fusion
item.description: PID-controlled multi-robot coordination with dynamic speed adaptation: 97.93% reduction in tracking errors. Research paper submitted.

item.title: NAO Robot Language Tutor: HRI System
item.description: AI-powered humanoid robot tutor with synchronised speech, gestures and adaptive lesson flow. Real-time two-way conversation via Python sockets.

item.title: Magnet-Detecting Robot: Pololu 3Pi+
item.description: Autonomous robot with boundary detection, PID control, and BFS shortest-path planning for systematic magnet location.

item.title: CIFAR-10 Deep Learning Classifier
item.description: CNN-based image classification pipeline on CIFAR-10 with visual analysis dashboard. Data augmentation, batch norm, dropout.
